name: Ravenscar
classification_notes: Ravenscar is a multi-optical-size serif family spanning Fine, Display, Large Text and Text grades, suggesting a contemporary approach to the classical optical size tradition seen in type families designed for high-quality editorial and book work.
summary: A four-grade optical size serif from Jeremy Tankard, ranging from Fine to Display and through Large Text and Text for use across a full range of print and editorial contexts.
description: Ravenscar is organised into four optical sub-families: Fine, Display, Large Text and Text, each tuned to different reading conditions and scales. Weights range from ExtraLight to Black depending on grade, and italics are present across the family. The structure reflects a rigorous approach to type for editorial and book publishing where optical size differentiation matters.
foundry_blurb: Jeremy Tankard Typography presents Ravenscar as a family with four distinct optical grades: Fine, Display, Large Text and Text, shown across a wide range of weight and style combinations including italics, blacks and light cuts, designed to work across the full spectrum of typographic use.
